title: OP-1 Operational Status Contract And Honesty Gate
acceptance_criteria: status --json has the named strict operational-status.v1 contract
wrong status field types fail validation
CLI and in-process status objects agree
repeated CLI status output is byte-identical
canonical verification executes the operational-status validator
the OP-1 checkpoint does not expand the implemented capability set
resource_trace_summary remains false at the OP-1 checkpoint
evidence is bound to the exact OP-1 checkpoint commit
external_side_effect_boundaries: no wallet, payment, or real mining behavior
rollback_method: Revert the OP-1 commit range from the pilot branch and rerun pwsh -NoProfile -File .\eng.ps1 verify.
evidence_expectations: terminal scan raw-root, encoded-root, sentinel, and scanner-error counts are zero
c3_harness_004_disposition: open / accepted_for_offline_v0.2; not fixed, passed, or closed by OP-1
op_2_scope: OP-2 is not part of the OP-1 checkpoint.
